---
title: "Consulting"
---

I am available for research consulting, expert witness testimony, and training consultation on topics related to policing and active shooter preparedness. My work bridges academic research and practical law enforcement application, and I have experience translating complex findings for legal, policy, and operational audiences.

**Areas of Expertise**

- Active shooter incident analysis, response protocols, and training program evaluation
- Law enforcement performance under stress and high-stakes decision making
- Use of force analysis and officer decision making
- Public opinion of police and community-police relations
- Expert witness services in use of force and police practices litigation

**Inquiry**

For consulting inquiries, expert witness requests, or speaking engagements, please complete the form below or email directly at [MartaindaleLLC\@gmail.com](mailto:MartaindaleLLC@gmail.com).

<!-- TODO: Replace YOUR_FORMSPREE_FORM_ID with your Formspree endpoint.
     Sign up free at https://formspree.io — 50 submissions/month on the free tier.
     After creating a form, your endpoint looks like: https://formspree.io/f/abcd1234 -->

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/mykbwyyn" method="POST" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-name" class="form-label">Name</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="c-name" name="name" required>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-email" class="form-label">Email</label>
    <input type="email" class="form-control" id="c-email" name="email" required>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-org" class="form-label">Organization</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="c-org" name="organization">
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-type" class="form-label">Type of Inquiry</label>
    <select class="form-select" id="c-type" name="inquiry_type">
      <option value="">Select...</option>
      <option value="consulting">Research Consulting</option>
      <option value="expert-witness">Expert Witness</option>
      <option value="speaking">Speaking Engagement</option>
      <option value="training">Training Consultation</option>
      <option value="media">Media Request</option>
      <option value="other">Other</option>
    </select>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-message" class="form-label">Message</label>
    <textarea class="form-control" id="c-message" name="message" rows="5" required></textarea>
  </div>
  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send Inquiry</button>
</form>
